task: Write a Python function that validates an AWS S3 bucket name according to AWS naming rules (3-63 characters, lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens only, cannot start or end with hyphen)
Create a JSON object representing an AWS IAM policy that allows read-only access to a specific S3 bucket named 'my-data-bucket'
Write a regular expression that matches valid AWS ARN (Amazon Resource Name) formats, such as 'arn:aws:s3:::bucket-name' or 'arn:aws:iam::123456789012:user/username'
